title: OIDC federation for Databricks-to-open Delta Sharing is generally available
body:
Using Open ID Connect (OIDC) federation for Delta Sharing, where recipients use JSON web tokens (JWT) from their own IdP as short-lived OAuth tokens for secure, federated authentication, is generally available.

See [Enable Open ID Connect (OIDC) federation for OpenSharing recipients](/aws/en/opensharing/create-recipient-oidc-fed).

ref_links.text: Enable Open ID Connect (OIDC) federation for OpenSharing recipients
